title: Am-Tech 10" Mini Small Plastic Tool Box With Removable Tray
features: DURABLE: This 250mm (10") mini tool box is made from tough impact resistant plastic for durability
VERSATILE: With a carry handle, a 5mm diameter padlock hole and a removable tray, it is ideal for storing all kinds of tools
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
description: From the manufacturer 10″ mini tool box Durable plastic tool box with double clip closure Removable tray Carry handle 5mm diameter hole for padlock Ideal for storing all kinds of tools Approx size: 250 x 120 x 100mm See More
